title: geox_claim_create (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `geox_claim_create`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing geox schema for `geox_claim_create` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: 'This structure is drill-ready' is not just geology — it can become a budget, partner signal, or career liability.

symbolic_consequence.description: §3.G — A geological claim becomes capital-symbolic quickly.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every geox_claim_create output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
